if.test: dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'mysql' or dbType == 'mariadb'

select.if:
select DISTINCT op.id, op.code, op.name, op.valid, op.gender, op.status, op.modify_time, op.entry_date as entryDate, op.title, op.qualification, op.education, op.major, op.id_number as idNumber, pos.code as mainPositionCode, pos.name as mainPositionName from org_person op join org_person_department opd on op.id = opd.person_id join org_department od on opd.dept_id = od.id join org_position pos on op.main_position = pos.id where od.code = #{departmentCode} and od.valid = 1 and op.valid = 1 order by op.modify_time desc
limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select * from (select ROW_NUMBER() over (order by modify_time desc) as tempId, * from ( select DISTINCT op.id, op.code, op.name, op.valid, op.gender, op.status, op.modify_time, op.entry_date as entryDate, op.title, op.qualification, op.education, op.major, op.id_number as idNumber, pos.code as mainPositionCode, pos.name as mainPositionName from org_person op join org_person_department opd on op.id = opd.person_id join org_department od on opd.dept_id = od.id join org_position pos on op.main_position = pos.id where od.code = #{departmentCode} and od.valid = 1 and op.valid = 1 )as a )as a where a.tempId between #{sqlserverOffset} and #{pointer}

mapper.select: select count(distinct op.id) from org_person op join org_person_department opd on op.id = opd.person_id join org_department od on opd.dept_id = od.id join org_position pos on op.main_position = pos.id where od.code = #{departmentCode} and od.valid = 1 and op.valid = 1

if.test: dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'mysql' or dbType == 'mariadb'

select.if:
select distinct op.id, op.code, op.name, op.valid, op.gender, op.status, op.modify_time, op.entry_date as entryDate, op.title, op.qualification, op.education, op.major, op.id_number as idNumber, pos.code as mainPositionCode, pos.name as mainPositionName from org_person op join org_person_position opp on op.id = opp.person_id join org_position opos on opp.position_id = opos.id join org_position pos on op.main_position = pos.id where opos.code = #{positionCode} and opos.valid = 1 and op.valid = 1 order by op.modify_time desc
limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select * from (select ROW_NUMBER() over (order by modify_time desc) as tempId, * from ( select distinct op.id, op.code, op.name, op.valid, op.gender, op.status, op.modify_time, op.entry_date as entryDate, op.title, op.qualification, op.education, op.major, op.id_number as idNumber, pos.code as mainPositionCode, pos.name as mainPositionName from org_person op join org_person_position opp on op.id = opp.person_id join org_position opos on opp.position_id = opos.id join org_position pos on op.main_position = pos.id where opos.code = #{positionCode} and opos.valid = 1 and op.valid = 1 )as a )as a where a.tempId between #{sqlserverOffset} and #{pointer}

mapper.select: select count(distinct op.id) from org_person op left join org_person_position opp on op.id = opp.person_id left join org_position opos on opp.position_id = opos.id left join org_position pos on op.main_position = pos.id where opos.code = #{positionCode} and opos.valid = 1 and op.valid = 1

if.test: dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'mysql' or dbType == 'mariadb'

select.if:
select distinct op.id, op.code, op.name, op.valid, op.gender, op.status, op.modify_time, op.entry_date as entryDate, op.title, op.qualification, op.education, op.major, op.id_number as idNumber, pos.code as mainPositionCode, pos.name as mainPositionName from org_person op left join org_person_company opc on op.id = opc.person_id left join org_company oc on opc.company_id = oc.id left join org_position pos on op.main_position = pos.id where oc.code = #{companyCode} and oc.valid = 1 and op.valid = 1 order by op.modify_time desc
limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select * from (select ROW_NUMBER() over (order by modify_time desc) as tempId, * from ( select distinct op.id, op.code, op.name, op.valid, op.gender, op.status, op.modify_time, op.entry_date as entryDate, op.title, op.qualification, op.education, op.major, op.id_number as idNumber, pos.code as mainPositionCode, pos.name as mainPositionName from org_person op left join org_person_company opc on op.id = opc.person_id left join org_company oc on opc.company_id = oc.id left join org_position pos on op.main_position = pos.id where oc.code = #{companyCode} and oc.valid = 1 and op.valid = 1 )as a )as a where a.tempId between #{sqlserverOffset} and #{pointer}

mapper.select: select count(distinct op.id) from org_person op left join org_person_company opc on op.id = opc.person_id left join org_company oc on opc.company_id = oc.id left join org_position pos on op.main_position = pos.id where oc.code = #{companyCode} and oc.valid = 1 and op.valid = 1

if.test: dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'mysql' or dbType == 'mariadb'

select.if:
select * from (select ROW_NUMBER() over (order by modify_time desc) as tempId, * from ( select distinct op.id, op.code, op.name, op.valid, op.gender, op.status, op.modify_time, op.entry_date as entryDate, op.title, op.qualification, op.education, op.major, op.id_number as idNumber, mainPos.code as mainPositionCode, mainPos.name as mainPositionName from org_person op left join org_position mainPos on op.main_position = mainPos.id
where op.modify_time > #{modifyTime} )as a )as a
where op.valid = 1 )as a )as a
where a.tempId between #{sqlserverOffset} and #{pointer}

if.test: dbType == null or dbType == '' or dbType == 'mysql' or dbType == 'mariadb' or dbType == 'sqlserver'

mapper.select: select distinct op.id, op.code, op.name, op.valid, op.gender, op.status, op.modify_time as modifyTime, op.entry_date as entryDate, op.title, op.qualification, op.education, op.major, op.id_number as idNumber, mainPos.code as mainPositionCode, mainPos.name as mainPositionName from org_person op left join org_position mainPos on op.main_position = mainPos.id where op.code = #{personCode} and op.valid = 1

select opp.person_id as personId, position.code as positionCode, position.name as positionName from org_person_position opp left join org_position position on opp.position_id = position.id where opp.valid = 1 and opp.person_id = #{personId}
mapper.update: update org_person set user_id= #{userId},user_name= #{userName} where id=#{personId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from org_person where user_id is not null

select count(1) from (select distinct person.id from org_person_company company left join org_person person on company.person_id = person.id where person.valid=1 and person.sys_flag=0 and company.valid=1
and company.company_id = #{companyId}
and (person.user_name like #{keyword} or person.name like #{keyword})
and person.user_name is not null ) temp
select count(id) from org_person where user_id is not null and valid = 1

select src.company_id as companyId, src.person_id as personId from org_person_company src left join org_person_company target on src.person_id = target.person_id where target.company_id = #{companyId}
select gender, avatar_url as avatarUrl from org_person where id = #{peronId} and valid = 1

select.if:
select * from (select temp.*,rownum row_id from (select per.*, directPer.name AS directLeaderName, grandPer.name AS grandLeaderName from org_person per LEFT JOIN org_person directPer ON per.direct_leader_id = directPer.id LEFT JOIN org_person grandPer ON per.grand_leader_id = grandPer.id inner join (select DISTINCT comRel.person_id as pid from org_person_company comRel WHERE comRel.valid = 1 and comRel.company_id = #{companyId}) rel ON per.id = rel.pid WHERE per.VALID = 1 and per.sys_flag = 0
and (per.code like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' or per.name like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' or per.phone like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' )
and
per.code like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.name like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.description like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.email like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.phone like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and per.gender in
#{gender}
and per.status in
#{status}
and per.status != 'sys_person_status/offWork'
order by per.modify_time desc) temp) where row_id between #{offset} and #{pointer}

select * from (select temp.*,rownum row_id from (select per.*, directPer.name AS directLeaderName, grandPer.name AS grandLeaderName from org_person per LEFT JOIN org_person directPer ON per.direct_leader_id = directPer.id LEFT JOIN org_person grandPer ON per.grand_leader_id = grandPer.id inner join org_person_position rel ON per.id = rel.person_id WHERE per.VALID = 1 AND rel.VALID = 1 AND per.sys_flag = 0
and rel.position_id in
#{posId}
and (per.code like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' or per.name like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' or per.phone like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' )
and
per.code like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.name like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.description like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.email like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.phone like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and per.gender in
#{gender}
and per.status in
#{status}
and per.status != 'sys_person_status/offWork'
order by per.modify_time desc) temp) where row_id between #{offset} and #{pointer}

mapper.select: select opc.person_id as personId, company.code as companyCode, company.full_name as companyName from org_person_company opc left join org_company company on opc.company_id = company.id where opc.valid = 1 and opc.person_id = #{personId}

select opd.person_id as personId, department.code as departmentCode, department.name as departmentName from org_person_department opd left join org_department department on opd.dept_id = department.id where opd.valid = 1 and opd.person_id = #{personId}

select.if:
select orgPerson.*, orgPosition.id AS posId, orgPosition.full_path AS posFullPath, orgPosition.company_id AS companyId, orgPosition.code AS posCode, orgPosition.name AS posName, orgPosition.parent_id AS posParentId, orgPosition.dep_id AS posDeptId, orgPosition.lay_rec AS posLayRec, orgDept.id AS deptId, orgDept.full_path AS deptFullPath, orgDept.code AS deptCode, orgDept.name AS deptName, orgDept.parent_id AS deptParentId, orgDept.lay_rec AS deptLayRec, orgCom.short_name AS comShortName, orgCom.full_path AS comFullPath from (select * from (select temp.*,rownum row_id from (select per.*, directPer.name AS directLeaderName, grandPer.name AS grandLeaderName from org_person per LEFT JOIN org_person directPer ON per.direct_leader_id = directPer.id LEFT JOIN org_person grandPer ON per.grand_leader_id = grandPer.id inner join (select DISTINCT comRel.person_id as pid from org_person_company comRel WHERE comRel.valid = 1 and comRel.company_id = #{companyId}) rel ON per.id = rel.pid WHERE per.VALID = 1 and per.sys_flag = 0
and (per.code like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' or per.name like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' or per.phone like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' )
and
per.code like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.name like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.description like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.email like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.phone like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and per.gender in
#{gender}
and per.status in
#{status}
and per.status != 'sys_person_status/offWork'
order by per.modify_time desc) temp) where row_id between #{offset} and #{pointer} ) orgPerson LEFT JOIN org_person_position perPosRel ON orgPerson.id = perPosRel.person_id LEFT JOIN org_position orgPosition ON orgPosition.id = perPosRel.position_id LEFT JOIN org_department orgDept ON orgDept.id = orgPosition.dep_id LEFT JOIN org_company orgCom ON orgCom.id = orgPosition.company_id WHERE perPosRel.valid = 1 ORDER BY orgPerson.modify_time desc

select orgPerson.*, orgPosition.id AS posId, orgPosition.full_path AS posFullPath, orgPosition.company_id AS companyId, orgPosition.code AS posCode, orgPosition.name AS posName, orgPosition.parent_id AS posParentId, orgPosition.dep_id AS posDeptId, orgPosition.lay_rec AS posLayRec, orgDept.id AS deptId, orgDept.full_path AS deptFullPath, orgDept.code AS deptCode, orgDept.name AS deptName, orgDept.parent_id AS deptParentId, orgDept.lay_rec AS deptLayRec, orgCom.short_name AS comShortName, orgCom.full_path AS comFullPath from (select * from (select temp.*,rownum row_id from (select per.*, directPer.name AS directLeaderName, grandPer.name AS grandLeaderName from org_person per LEFT JOIN org_person directPer ON per.direct_leader_id = directPer.id LEFT JOIN org_person grandPer ON per.grand_leader_id = grandPer.id inner join org_person_position rel ON per.id = rel.person_id WHERE per.VALID = 1 AND rel.VALID = 1 AND per.sys_flag = 0
and rel.position_id in
#{posId}
and (per.code like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' or per.name like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' or per.phone like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\' )
and
per.code like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.name like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.description like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.email like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and
per.phone like #{pattern} ESCAPE '\'
and per.gender in
#{gender}
and per.status in
#{status}
and per.status != 'sys_person_status/offWork'
order by per.modify_time desc) temp) where row_id between #{offset} and #{pointer} ) orgPerson LEFT JOIN org_person_position perPosRel ON orgPerson.id = perPosRel.person_id LEFT JOIN org_position orgPosition ON orgPosition.id = perPosRel.position_id LEFT JOIN org_department orgDept ON orgDept.id = orgPosition.dep_id LEFT JOIN org_company orgCom ON orgCom.id = orgPosition.company_id WHERE perPosRel.valid = 1 ORDER BY orgPerson.modify_time desc
